calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Notice Of Opposition To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-06-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Debra Bragg, daughter of judgment debtor, Raymond P. Montano
Philip T. Kilduff, Esq., for Creditor and opposing party: Hudson & Keyse, LLC.

After hearing, the claim of excemption is granted in part. $2,320 returned to debtor, $3,814 to creditor to satisfy the judgment. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
